title: cinchona calisaya var. vera
intro: Cinchona calisaya var. vera is a variant of the Cinchona calisaya plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to the Andean region of South America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties due to the presence of quinine, a natural alkaloid that has been used to treat malaria and other fevers. The health benefits of Cinchona calisaya var. vera include reducing fever, relieving pain, and acting as an anti-inflammatory agent, making it a popular herbal remedy for various conditions. Cinchona calisaya var. vera is commonly prepared in herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
